items.title: Linus Torvalds says Linux security list is becoming ‘unmanageable’ due to AI bug reports
items.summary: Linux founder Linus Torvalds said in his most recent state of the kernel post that "the continued flood of AI reports has basically made the security list almost entirely unmana...

items.summary: It isn't just lazy. It's also mind-numbingly boring.

items.title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
items.summary: The open source project said hackers stole its codebase and threatened to publish its source code if the company did not pay.
